title: 99nightinforest
description: horror and quest based mod for fun
body:
99 Nights in the Forest is a hardcore survival Minecraft mod that transforms the peaceful wilderness into a terrifying battle for endurance. Trapped deep inside a dark, hostile forest, players must survive 99 continuous nights while unknown dangers stalk them from the shadows.

As each night passes, the forest becomes more aggressive—mobs grow stronger, visibility drops, and mysterious events begin to occur. Resources are scarce, forcing players to think strategically, craft wisely, and manage hunger, health, and sanity. The mod emphasizes atmospheric horror, making every sound, movement, and shadow feel dangerous.

Key features include:

Progressive difficulty that increases night by night

Dark forest environment with limited visibility

Custom mobs, eerie sounds, and unexpected encounters

Survival-focused gameplay with high tension

Perfect for challenge runs, horror gameplay, and YouTube content

99 Nights in the Forest is ideal for players who enjoy intense survival challenges, horror-themed Minecraft mods, and pure adrenaline-filled gameplay. Can you outlast the forest and survive all 99 nights? 🌲🔥
